summary._source: 2C-x is the 2C family of phenethylamine psychedelics (e.g. 2C-B, 2C-E, 2C-I). Varying profiles; most are active in the 10-25 mg range.
summary.text: 2C-x is the 2C family of phenethylamine psychedelics (e.g. 2C-B, 2C-E, 2C-I). Varying profiles; most are active in the 10-25 mg range.
